name: ocelot-merge-resolver
description: Six-shooter for your git conflicts. JetBrains-style 3-way merge resolver with mini-map, git history per side, and optional AI-assisted suggestions via the Anthropic API.

commands.title: Open current file in Merge Resolver

enumDescriptions: Stay in the main window, but close the bottom panel, the right auxiliary bar, and all other editor groups — leaving only the primary sidebar + the merge editor. (Claude-Code-style.)
Move the merge editor into a brand-new OS window.
Just open the editor — do not rearrange anything.
mergeResolver.openBehavior.markdownDescription:
How Merge Resolver arranges the workbench when it auto-opens a conflict.

- `focusMode` — close panel/aux bar/other groups, keep the primary sidebar.
- `newWindow` — move the editor into a separate OS window.
- `current` — leave everything as is.

mergeResolver.anthropicModel.description: Anthropic model to use for AI conflict resolution suggestions.
